title: Guide for Running Windows Containers in Kubernetes — Handling multiple Windows versions in the same cluster
text:
The Windows Server version used by each pod must match that of the node. If you want to use multiple Windows
Server versions in the same cluster, then you should set additional node labels and
nodeSelector
fields.
Kubernetes automatically adds a label,
node.kubernetes.io/windows-build
to simplify this.
This label reflects the Windows major, minor, and build number that need to match for compatibility.
Here are values used for each Windows Server version:
Product Name
Version
Windows Server 2022
10.0.20348
Windows Server 2025
10.0.26100
